footprint.label: Footprint
footprint.tooltip: How much CO₂ or water is consumed per unit of electricity, based on the energy mix of each zone.

impact.label: Impact
impact.tooltip: The real environmental damage caused by that consumption. Carbon impact equals carbon footprint, while water impact is adjusted for local water scarcity.

greenScore.label: Green Score
greenScore.tooltip: Overall environmental performance score that takes into account the region's carbon and water impact (the higher the better)

carbon.label: Carbon
carbon.tooltip: CO₂ equivalent emissions from electricity generation. Measured in gCO₂eq/kWh.

water.label: Water
water.tooltip: Freshwater consumed or stress caused by electricity generation. Measured in litres per kWh (footprint) or stress-litres per kWh (impact).

lifeCycle.label: Life Cycle
lifeCycle.tooltip: Includes all emissions and water use across the full life of the technology — manufacturing, operation and decommissioning.

operational.label: Operational
operational.tooltip: Only direct emissions and water use during electricity generation, excluding manufacturing and infrastructure.
